front: What are the main components of the CPU?
back: The main components are the control unit (CU), arithmetic logic unit (ALU), registers and cache memory.

front: What does the control unit do?
back: It controls and coordinates the operations of the CPU and the rest of the computer.

front: What does the arithmetic logic unit (ALU) do?
back: It carries out arithmetic calculations and logical operations.
Registers are very small, very fast memory locations inside the CPU.
Cache memory is a small amount of fast memory that stores frequently used data and instructions.
It is faster for the CPU to access than RAM, so it speeds up processing.
